scope.summary: F-LOW CF2: an OCID embedded in ordinary prose left quarantine through OTLP log bodies, span attributes, and metric labels; the shared redaction funnel now removes the identifier while keeping the message.
out_of_scope: Other identifier families (tenancy names, compartment paths, region slugs). The bead scopes this to the documented ocid1 shape; widening the recognizer to prose-shaped values would start destroying the error text this pipeline exists to carry.
The key-denylist and secret-shape heuristics, unchanged: this is a third, narrower rule that runs only after both decline.

entry_points.name: Redactor::redact_value / Redactor::filter
entry_points.trace: 52 oraclemcp-telemetry tests pass. Negative acceptance: an OCID at prefix, middle, suffix, before sentence punctuation, parenthesised, and comma-separated is redacted (ocids_embedded_in_prose_are_redacted_at_every_boundary); every OCID in a value is redacted, not just the first, and the surrounding message survives. Positive acceptance: 'ORA-00942: table or view does not exist', a bare 'ocid1' in prose, 'ocid1.instance', and 'xocid1.instance.oc1' are returned byte-identical. The funnel test pins that the rule lives in redact_value, which logs, span attributes, and metric labels all pass through.

entry_points.name: bash scripts/secret_scan.sh
entry_points.trace: OK (tracked tree + rendered surfaces). The test fixtures assemble the five-segment OCID at runtime from fragments precisely so the literal shape never appears in a tracked file — that gate greps every tracked path for it, and weakening it to accommodate a test would defeat the control that stops a real tenant id being committed.

limitations: Discriminating, verified by mutation: reverting the funnel to its previous behaviour fails all three OCID tests while the near-miss test keeps passing.
The recognizer is a bounded lexical scan, not an OCI-authoritative parser: a malformed identifier that does not reach three dot-separated segments is treated as prose by design.
Scoped verification: cargo test/clippy -p oraclemcp-telemetry. No workspace-wide run.
